excluded_baseline.frozen_v2_3_contact_statistics: No frozen V4-C feature extractor is implemented; excluded from v1 rather than treated as optional.

single_primary_decision.strongest_baseline_selection: maximum nested grouped CV Spearman including metadata_shortcut

retrospective_challenge.reason: The campaign already had partial result files before the split artifact was timestamped, so strict prospective untouched status cannot be proven.
retrospective_challenge.reuse_policy: Read once after the development configuration is frozen. Do not change the current version based on the result.

group_null.permutation_unit: near-CDR3-family mean with within-family residual preserved
group_null.failure_rule: A claimed model signal is unsupported if its open nested-CV Spearman is at or below the null 95th percentile.

future_formal_requirement: A deployable formal claim requires a new version, a new prospectively frozen panel, a frozen prediction file, model/config/checkpoint hashes, a one-shot evaluator receipt, family bootstrap, and paired group permutation before any label read.
fixed_target_note: V4-C is explicitly fixed-target. Target permutation or antigen ablation is not a meaningful gate for this sequence-only computational surrogate; those gates remain mandatory for any future cross-antigen target-conditioned claim.
failure_action: Retain v3_full only as a weak generic prior and use QC, uncertainty, diversity, and real docking for allocation.
claim_boundary: Development-only computational dual-docking geometry frontscreen; not formal experimental binding, affinity, competition, or blocking.
